g[0x10][2]=(0x28bcaf5)-(0x28BCAD4) g[0x11]=(g[0x3])-(0x25b2c12) g[0xE]=(g[0X8][0X5])-(0x46E81B7) local function t(u) local v={} u=b(u,"\026","") u=b(u,c(g[0x12][0x1],g[1],0X8B),"") u=b(u,c(g[0X12][0X1],g[0x1],0X8C),"") u=b(u,c(g[0X12][0X1],0x81,g[0x11]),"") u=b(u,c(0xef,187,0Xbf),"") local w={} local x=1 for y=1,#u do local z=e(u,y) if z>=g[0X10][0X2] and z<=g[0x12][0x6] then w[x]=c(z) x+=0x1 end end u=f(w) local ba=#u local bb=0x1 local bc=0X1 while bb<=ba do local bd=bb+0X4 local be=(bd<=ba) and g[0X10][0X3] or(ba-bb+0x1) if not(((g[0X6][0x8]) and(g[6][0x7]))) then else if be==0 then break end end local bf,bg,bh,bi,bj=e(u,bb,bd) bg=bg or g[0X12][0X6];bh=if not(not bh) then bh else g[0x12][0X6];bi=bi or g[0X12][0X6];bj=if bj then bj else g[0x12][0X6] local bk=((((bf-g[0X10][0X2])*g[0x6][0x4]+(bg-g[16][2]))*g[0x6][0X4]+(bh-g[0x10][0x2]))*g[0x6][0X4]+(bi-g[0x10][0x2]))*g[0x6][4]+(bj-g[0x10][0x2]) local bl=bk//g[0X12][0x2]%g[0X4] local bm=bk//g[0X6][0X2]%g[0X4] local bn=bk//g[0x4]%g[0X4] local bo=bk%g[0x4] local bp=c(bl,bm,bn,bo) if be<g[0X10][0X3] then bp=a(bp,0X1,be-0x1) end v[bc]=bp bc+=0X1 bb+=g[0x10][0x3] end return f(v) end g[0X8][0X4]=(g[0xC])-(0XF7E551) g[0X6][0x3]=(g[0X18])-(0x89a3e4) local function bq(br,bs) local bt={} local bu=#bs for bv=1,#br do local bw=((bv-1)%bu)+0X1 bt[bv]=c((e(br,bv)-e(bs,bw))%g[0x4]) end return f(bt) end g[0X8][0x1]=(g[0x3])-(0X25B2BD2) g[0x6][0X5]=(g[26])-(0X394479d) local function bx(by) local bz=e(by,1) if bz==0X0 then if not(((g[6][0X7]) and(g[6][0x1]))) then else return a(by,g[6][0x3]) end end local ca={} local cb=0X1 local cc=g[0X6][0x3] local cd=#by if not(((g[0x10][0x5]) and(g[0X10][0X4]))) then else while cc<=cd do local ce=e(by,cc) cc+=0X1 if ce<g[0X1] then local cf=ce+0x1 for cg=0x0,cf-0x1 do ca[cb]=a(by,cc+cg,cc+cg) cb+=0x1 end cc+=cf elseif ce<0xc0 then local ch=ce-g[8][0x4] local ci=e(by,cc) cc+=0X1 local cj=cb-ci for ck=0x0,ch-1 do ca[cb]=ca[cj+ck] cb+=0X1 end elseif ce<g[0X8][1] then local cl=ce-g[6][0x5] local cm=e(by,cc)*g[0X4]+e(by,cc+0x1) cc+=g[0X6][3] local cn=cb-cm for co=0X0,cl-0X1 do ca[cb]=ca[cn+co] cb+=0x1 end elseif ce==g[0x8][0x1] then local cp=e(by,cc)+0x24 local cq=e(by,cc+0x1)*g[0x4]+e(by,cc+g[0X6][0x3]) cc+=g[0XE] local cr=cb-cq for cs=0x0,cp-1 do ca[cb]=ca[cr+cs] cb+=0X1 end else local ct=e(by,cc)+0X4 local cu=a(by,cc+0X1,cc+0X1) cc+=g[0X6][3] for cv=0X0,ct-1 do ca[cb]=cu cb+=0X1 end end end end while g[0X10][0x4] do return f(ca) end end g[0X10][0X1]=(-(0x29583AE))+(0X2958419) local cw=bx(bq(t(r),t(s))) g[0X8][0X2]=(-(0x271A93A))+(0x271AA2F) if e(cw,0x1)~=0XF or e(cw,g[0x6][0x3])~=g[0x8][0x2] or e(cw,g[0xE])~=g[0X10][0x1] or e(cw,4)~=0X61 then while true do end end local cx=d(a(cw,g[0x10][0x3]))() return cx(...) end)(string.sub,string.gsub,string.char,loadstring,string.byte,table.concat,...)
